info.name: FlowEngine API
info.description:
Complete API collection for FlowEngine - Workflow orchestration system

## Features
- Create and manage workflows
- Create and manage workflow instances
- Execute state transitions
- Query workflows and instances

## Environment Variables
Make sure to set up the following variables in your Postman environment:
- `base_url`: http://localhost:8080
- `workflow_id`: Will be auto-populated
- `instance_id`: Will be auto-populated
- `actor_id`: Your actor/user ID

request.description: Check if the API server is healthy and running

request.description: Create a simple approval workflow with draft, review, approved, and rejected states

Get all workflows in the system
Get detailed information about a specific workflow

item.name: Transitions

request.description: Execute the 'submit' transition - from draft to review
Execute the 'approve' transition - from review to approved
Execute the 'reject' transition - from review to rejected
